items.definition_en: A bicycle is a vehicle with two wheels that you ride by pedaling.
items.example_en: He rides his bicycle to school every day.

items.definition_en: A bike is a two-wheeled vehicle you use with pedals.
items.example_en: I got a new bike for my birthday.

items.definition_en: A mountain bike is a strong bicycle made for rough paths.
items.example_en: She rides her mountain bike in the forest.

items.definition_en: A road bike is a bicycle made for riding on streets.
items.example_en: He enjoys long trips on his road bike.

items.definition_en: A folding bike is a bicycle that you can fold for easy carrying.
items.example_en: My folding bike fits easily in my car.

items.definition_en: A bike rack is a place where you can park and lock your bike.
items.example_en: He chained his bike to the bike rack.

items.definition_en: A handlebar is the part you hold to steer a bike or scooter.
items.example_en: She gripped the handlebar tightly.

items.definition_en: A saddle is the seat on a bicycle.
items.example_en: He adjusted his saddle before riding.

items.definition_en: A pedal is the part you push with your feet to make a bike move.
items.example_en: Her foot slipped off the pedal.

items.definition_en: A bell is a small device on a bike that makes a sound.
items.example_en: He rang the bell to warn the walkers.

items.definition_en: A helmet is a hard hat you wear for safety while cycling.
items.example_en: You should wear a helmet while riding.

items.definition_en: A kickstand is a small stand for holding a bicycle upright.
items.example_en: He used the kickstand to park his bike.

items.definition_en: A tire is the rubber part around a bike wheel.
items.example_en: The front tire was flat.

items.definition_en: A basket is a container on the front or back of a bike.
items.example_en: She put her bag in the basket.

items.definition_en: A chain is the metal part that connects bike pedals to the wheel.
items.example_en: The chain needs oil.

items.definition_en: A brake is the part of a bike or scooter that makes it stop.
items.example_en: The brake was very strong.

items.definition_en: A gear is a part that lets you change how hard or easy to pedal.
items.example_en: He shifted to a lower gear.

items.definition_en: An electric scooter is a small vehicle you stand on that moves with a motor.
items.example_en: She rented an electric scooter in the city.

items.definition_en: A kick scooter is a small vehicle you push with your foot.
items.example_en: Children ride their kick scooters in the park.

items.definition_en: A bicycle lane is a special part of the road for bikes.
items.example_en: She stayed in the bicycle lane while riding.
